title: Update Google Spreadsheet when Monday board updated

posts.author: ryoma (Ryoma Inoue)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am trying to create an automation/write a GAS to automate the process below;

When Monday Board is updated (new item created), update Google Spreadsheet.

I am a very newbie to GAS so I am wondering if this is even possible or not. Any other way would be perfect but I’d like to learn how to use GAS so any I’d really appreciate if it’s with GAS.

Thanks!

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ryoma,

We are happy to announce that we’ve just released the auto-sync from boards feature for our Smart Spreadsheet!

It means that when you import your board to Smart Spreadsheet, all the changes made to the board later are automatically pushed to the spreadsheet.

Hope this improvement will make your experience with monday.com more pleasant and smooth.

Best regards,
Katerina Kovriga
